ptbr_internet.title: PT-BR Internet Kit
ptbr_internet.description: Compressed Brazilian internet-native markers, pauses, reactions, and light meme formatting.
rules: Use at most one reaction marker unless the source already feels chaotic.
Prefer native PT-BR markers over generic emoji.
Formatting should feel like a real post, reply, or note, not decoration.

ptbr_reflective.title: PT-BR Reflective Kit
ptbr_reflective.description: Minimal formatting for reflective and narrative PT-BR writing.
rules: Keep formatting sparse.
Do not inject meme markers or loud emoji.
Use spacing and line breaks as the main expressive tool.

ptbr_caption.title: PT-BR Caption Kit
ptbr_caption.description: Compact PT-BR caption formatting for punchy social copy.
rules: Keep it short and visual.
One reaction marker is usually enough.
Caption rhythm matters more than full exposition.

casual_us_reply.title: Casual US Reply Kit
casual_us_reply.description: Current American note/reply markers with lived-in internet texture.
rules: Avoid generic sparkle or celebration emoji.
One lived-in marker beats multiple cute markers.
If the source is short, keep the formatting equally compact.

english_note_reflective.title: English Reflective Note Kit
english_note_reflective.description: Minimal note-like formatting for reflective English.
rules: Keep it sparse and breathable.
Use line breaks as pacing, not decoration.
Avoid meme markers or loud emoji.

english_bio_operator.title: English Operator Bio Kit
english_bio_operator.description: Clean formatting for professional bios that still feel internet-native.
rules: No decorative emoji.
Use formatting to clarify, not to perform.
Keep it profile-ready and compact.

british_banter.title: British Banter Kit
british_banter.description: Dry UK internet texture with understatement and light jabs.
rules: Keep it dry, not hyper.
Avoid loud meme emoji.
Use phrasing rather than symbols to carry tone.

thread_scanner.title: Thread Scanner Kit
thread_scanner.description: Formatting for thread-like internet writing that needs clear scanning structure.
rules: Structure should help scanning.
Do not let it turn into essay formatting.
Use only the minimum shape needed.

worldwide_ironic.title: Worldwide Ironic Kit
worldwide_ironic.description: Internet irony markers, caps bursts, and compressed reaction formatting.
rules: Do not overuse emoji or caps.
Keep irony legible and intentional.
Use symbols only if the donor culture would actually do it.

professional_clean.title: Professional Clean Kit
professional_clean.description: Formatting for bios, operator-style intros, and clean internet-facing professional writing.
rules: No decorative emoji.
Use formatting for clarity, not personality inflation.
Keep the surface internet-ready but still credible.
